original_statement: what other name did asian cougar have?
mutated_statement: what other name did that thing have?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Attribute deletion + Generalization: specific entity with regional modifier "asian cougar" replaced by vague demonstrative "that thing" | removal of "asian" | loss of specific referent (asian cougar→that thing)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中内容识别关键信息：agent在judge_thought明确写道在表格中第20行列出 asian cougar / kuuga，说明 Asian Cougar 改名为 Kuuga，因此其他名字是 Kuuga。整个执行日志和judge均直接给出具体答案且未提及问题的模糊性、未请求澄清或表示不确定。agent的具体表现是把变异问题当作与原始问题等价的明确查询，直接从表中提取并返回一个确定的名字。由于没有任何不确定性表述或反问，符合“无法意识到指令模糊”类别。
